items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures slip as fallout from Trump's tariff reversal unsettles market
items.description: Wall Street has been buffeted by the winds of Trump's tariffs over the weekend. A SCOTUS ruling was quickly refuted by the president in a fast-developing situation.

items.title: Tariff costs and refunds take the spotlight as Home Depot, TJX and other retailers report earnings this week

items.title: Retail crime wave hits CVS, Walmart, Home Depot, luxury stores
items.description: While people debate exactly how much crime has been committed against retailers and exactly who's committing it, the numbers remain stark. "Retailers reported an 18% increase in the average number of shoplifting incidents per year in 2024 versus 2023, and threats or acts of violence during ...
